question: Show the stadium name and the number of concerts in each stadium.
prediction:
FROM stadium AS S
| JOIN concert AS C ON S.Stadium_ID = C.Stadium_ID
| GROUP S.Stadium_ID
| AGG S.Name, count(*) AS concert_count
| SELECT S.Name, concert_count

steps.prediction:
FROM stadium AS S
| JOIN concert AS C ON S.Stadium_ID = C.Stadium_ID
| GROUP S.Stadium_ID
| AGG S.Name, count(*) AS concert_count
| SELECT S.Name, concert_count

evaluation.converted_sql:
SELECT Name, concert_count
FROM (
  SELECT S.Name, count(*) AS concert_count
  FROM stadium AS S
  JOIN concert AS C ON S.Stadium_ID = C.Stadium_ID
  GROUP BY S.Stadium_ID
) AS sqlplus_result;

question: Show the stadium name and capacity with most number of concerts in year 2014 or after.
prediction:
FROM concert AS T1
| JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.Stadium_ID = T2.Stadium_ID
| WHERE T1.Year > 2013
| GROUP T2.Stadium_ID
| AGG T2.Name, T2.Capacity, count(*) AS concert_count
| SELECT T2.Name, T2.Capacity
| ORDER concert_count DESC
| LIMIT 1

steps.prediction:
FROM concert AS T1
| JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.Stadium_ID = T2.Stadium_ID
| WHERE T1.Year > 2013
| GROUP T2.Stadium_ID
| AGG T2.Name, T2.Capacity, count(*) AS concert_count
| SELECT T2.Name, T2.Capacity
| ORDER concert_count DESC
| LIMIT 1

evaluation.converted_sql:
SELECT Name, Capacity
FROM (
  SELECT T2.Name, T2.Capacity, count(*) AS concert_count
  FROM concert AS T1
  JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.Stadium_ID = T2.Stadium_ID
  WHERE (T1.Year > 2013)
  GROUP BY T2.Stadium_ID
) AS sqlplus_result
ORDER BY concert_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
